approval_statement: I, edithatogo, approve bounded pilot evidence census SHA-256 ec0fd4bf4b68bf265ea2bb342982816a820ccefcd2c8c7f69c4324f76851f6cd as committed in c66de8f6efa1ce7835b5751e1ff598a46a58c184 and blinded pilot codebook SHA-256 2848b675b63231d97fb4d47f5b8bdff4cd1e9947676ed50af80dbaa0e128bde9 as committed in 3e9de3404e6c41f894d7fa0e9dc325559d83fd28 for bounded local execution-input promotion only. I approve the complete mechanical census of five correspondence blocks, all three supplemental request 11872 attachments, request 35076’s verified empty attachment inventory, and the blinded 17-state vocabulary and decision rules. This does not authorize context presentation, analyst execution, reconciliation, empirical-result approval, population inference, archive-wide claims, human-reviewed claims, gold promotion, legal certification, redistribution, publication, training, fine-tuning, release, dataset publication, or paper updates. A separately committed exact execution authorization and successful clean-HEAD pre-execution verification remain required.
